title: RESTORE - 211info
text: BEND-REDMOND HABITAT FOR HUMANITY RESTORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Sells donated new and reclaimed building materials, pre-owned furniture and appliances, and a variety of home improvement items. Proceeds from sales support building homes. Accepts donations of building materials, cabinets, doors and windows, flooring, lighting, plumbing, tools, furniture and home decor, appliances, and miscellaneous items. Pickup is available for items that do not fit in a passenger vehicle. 224 NE Thurston Avenue Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Store: Monday-Saturday 9am-6pm Donations: Monday-Saturday 9am-5pm, Sunday 11am-3pm Email (541) 548-1406 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 548-1406 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by item. Donation pick up $40. DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Crook, Deschutes, and Jefferson Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Corner of North 3rd Street and Thurston Avenue, across the street from Wagner Mall Services: Appliance Donation Programs Building Materials/Supplies Donation Programs Donation Pickups Electronics/Small Appliance Donation Programs Furniture/Home Furnishings Donation Programs Low Cost Building Materials/Supplies Thrift Shops Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMEOWNERSHIP PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BEND-REDMOND HABITAT FOR HUMANITY
